item.title: Chris Dell: Former Booking.com exec on the hidden operating system behind global scale
item.description: Chris Dell spent 14 years building content at Booking.com, but his perspective goes far beyond volume. In this episode, he explores why content is the hidden operating system behind global…Read more

item.title: Why high-quality automatic subtitling is harder than it looks
item.description: Subtitles are more than text on screen. Explore why segmentation, typography, and AI make automatic subtitling far more complex than it first appears.Read more

item.title: Build or buy? You’re probably asking the wrong question
item.description: Building a translation prototype is easy. Making it work at scale is another story. This article explores why most organizations succeed with a hybrid approach: buy the infrastructure and build…Read more

item.title: Machine translation post-editing: best practices, workflows, and tools in the AI era
item.description: Discover how machine translation post-editing enables global teams to scale multilingual content using AI translation, automated workflows, and human linguistic expertise.Read more

item.title: Global travel growth is accelerating, but conversion and loyalty are won locally
item.description: Every head of product knows that users want to feel at ease and well understood when they use a new app or website. If travel brands can achieve this by…Read more

item.title: Why localization ecosystems outperform traditional vendor setups: Insight from Argos Multilingual and Personio
item.description: Localization teams often spend more time coordinating vendors than managing translation. In this webinar discussion, Personio, Argos Multilingual, and Phrase explore how ecosystem collaboration can remove operational friction and help…Read more

item.title: The cloud nexus: Localized infrastructure and the next tech revolution
item.description: Hybrid cloud, edge AI and 5G are transforming how global technology platforms operate. As infrastructure becomes more distributed, companies must manage new challenges around compliance, content delivery, and regional regulation.…Read more

item.title: Todd Unger: The ten seconds to win or lose a customer
item.description: Todd Unger, Chief Experience Officer at the American Medical Association, discusses how modern buying decisions often happen in just seconds. In this episode of In Other Words, he explores the…Read more

item.title: Rethinking retail growth: why precision beats scale
item.description: Retailers are chasing scale, but growth in 2026 comes from precision. Learn how market-aware omnichannel, adaptive AI, localized mobile commerce, and culturally relevant social strategies unlock higher conversion, retention, and…Read more
